column_definitions.from_name: Raw source name from period A.
column_definitions.to_name: Raw target name from period B; nullable for no-match/unknown.
column_definitions.from_canonical_name: Normalized source name used for lexical matching.
column_definitions.to_canonical_name: Normalized target name used for lexical matching.
column_definitions.from_id: Source ID from user column or internal fallback key.
column_definitions.to_id: Target ID from user column or internal fallback key.
column_definitions.link_type: One of rename, split, merge, transfer, no_match, unknown.
column_definitions.constraints_passed: JSON object of boolean checks (candidate_membership, anchor_match).
column_definitions.<anchor columns>: User-provided anchor context columns, appended dynamically.
column_definitions.review_flags: List of quality flags for manual review.

notes.anchor_columns: Appended dynamically when provided in request.anchor_cols.
notes.many_to_many: Multiple rows per from_key and per to_key are allowed.
notes.resume_source: links_raw.jsonl is the resumability source of truth in each run directory.
